meta.description: Quick Email standard templates. Edit this file to add or change defaults.
syntax: {{token}} - replaced with the matching matter-detail value (empty if missing)
{{#if token}}…{{/if}} - whole block disappears cleanly if the token is empty
{{#if token}}…{{else}}…{{/if}} - swap to the else branch when token is empty
Aliases: snake_case forms (officer_name, client_name, …) work too.

templates.name: Bail details request
templates.description: Ask the OIC to confirm bail return date, time and conditions.
templates.bodyTemplate:
Dear {{officerSalutation}},

I write in relation to {{clientName}}, who was dealt with at {{station}}{{#if date}} on {{date}}{{/if}}.

Please confirm the bail return date, time, and any bail conditions imposed.

Kind regards,
{{feeEarnerName}}

templates.name: Representation confirmation
templates.description: Confirm to the OIC that you act for the client.
templates.bodyTemplate:
Dear {{officerSalutation}},

I confirm that I represent {{clientName}} in relation to this matter{{#if offenceType}} ({{offenceType}}){{/if}}.

Please ensure that any future correspondence is sent to me at this email address.

Kind regards,
{{feeEarnerName}}

templates.name: Disclosure request
templates.description: Ask for disclosure ahead of interview or to take instructions.
templates.bodyTemplate:
Dear {{officerSalutation}},

I am instructed in relation to {{clientName}}, who is attending {{stationLabel}}{{#if date}} on {{date}}{{/if}}{{#if time24}} at {{time24}}{{/if}}{{#if attendanceType}} as a {{attendanceType}}{{/if}}{{#if offenceType}} in relation to {{offenceType}}{{/if}}.

Please could you provide disclosure ahead of the interview, or alternatively contact me so that I can take instructions.

Kind regards,
{{feeEarnerName}}

templates.name: Follow-up / chase
templates.description: Polite chaser when an officer hasn't replied.
templates.bodyTemplate:
Dear {{officerSalutation}},

I refer to my earlier email in relation to {{clientName}}{{#if station}} at {{station}}{{/if}}.

I should be grateful for your response when convenient.

Kind regards,
{{feeEarnerName}}

templates.name: Voluntary attendance arrangement
templates.description: Arrange a voluntary attendance interview with the OIC.
templates.bodyTemplate:
Dear {{officerSalutation}},

I write in relation to {{clientName}}{{#if offenceType}} regarding {{offenceType}}{{/if}}.

Please let me know the proposed arrangements for voluntary attendance, including the date, time, and station. {{#if date}}If {{date}}{{#if time}} at {{time}}{{/if}} at {{station}} is convenient, please confirm.
{{/if}}
Disclosure in advance of the interview would be appreciated so that I can advise my client properly.

Kind regards,
{{feeEarnerName}}
